series_metadata.series_description: Attorney Case Files containing communications, documents, hearing files related to denials, suspensions, revocations, or terminations of supported living certificates/ residential facility licenses issued by the DODD, county board employee certification, medication certifications, overpayments or waiver review findings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain for 6 years after the closure of the case., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
